message:
test(proptest): expand process_tree, recorder_invariants, sharded_counter, wait, cpu_pressure to 37+ tests

Add behavioral invariant tests: ProcessState/PaneActivity snake_case serde,
contains_process root consistency, ProcessTreeConfig roundtrip; ViolationKind
count_by_kind exhaustiveness, duplicate sequence detection, zero-gap threshold;
ShardedGauge store/load/reset, ShardedSnapshot vec length preservation,
shard_values sum; QuiescenceState pending invariants, backoff sequence bounds,
WaitFor/WaitError observations; CpuPressureTier hash/ord consistency, partial
JSON defaults, multiplier monotonicity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
